basic_details.short_information: Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) Recruitment 2026 for 20 posts of Apprentice. Candidates with ITI, 8th Pass Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 20-05-2026, and closes on 11-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BBMB official website bbmb.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and ITI in respective trade for Lineman and Electrician, 8th class pass for Gardner

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Posts
